title: caiophora aspera
intro: Caiophora aspera, also known as the Rough-stemmed Caiophora, is a plant species in the family Polemoniaceae, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Caiophora aspera are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Caiophora aspera is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
